MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUL-10-2012 IN 206, DEFENDANT THOMAS HANSBERGER'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL HEARD. JUDGE MILLER MADE A PERSONAL DISCLOSURE THAT SHE REPRESENTED COUNSEL THOMAS HANSBERGER APPROXIMATELY 25 YEARS AGO. THIS WILL NOT AFFECT HER ABILITY TO BE FAIR AND IMPARTIAL IN THIS CASE. THERE WERE NO OBJECTIONS RAISED BY THE PARTIES AFTER THE DISCLOSURE WAS MADE. THE TRIAL DATE OF 7/16/12IS CONTINUED TO 12/17/12 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: MARLA J.
